text.title: Generative UI Design Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying generative-ui-design. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Generated UI lands in production; misses brand tokens + a11y; embarrassment.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated ideation output as final.
antipattern.fix: Always label ideation-only; require refinement pass.

antipattern.symptom: Stakeholders pick from 2 generated layouts; ideation collapses to coin-flip.
antipattern.fix: Generate ≥5; cheaper than the rework cost.

antipattern.symptom: Generator outputs violate brand tokens; designer reworks every variant.
antipattern.fix: Inject constraints in the prompt pre-gen.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline picks variant by aesthetic-score; output diverges from product goals.
antipattern.fix: Make selection a human gate; record rationale.
